TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sa'alo'alo Kasa'alo'alo o karomakatan no nanom, kafesa'ay han ko sowal, masonol tayra i riyar, fanaw ato roma 'alo. Sakimatiniay i, o 'alo 'ayaw no malananom, masonol i sera ato malalahod. O mimingay 'alo o cici', 'alo ato sa'owac . Tarawadaw i o kadado'edoan, kasaopoan no masonolay nanom; palolol to la'enoay no sera ato nemnem a nanom; misopeday o li^etecay ato so^eda parocek to palapala.
S.PHON: saʡaɾo~uʡaɾo~u kasaʡaɾo~uʡaɾo~u o~u karo~umakatan no~u nano~um, kafəsaʡaj ħan ko~u so~uwaɾ, maso~uno~uɾ tajra i rijar, fanaw ato~u ro~uma ʡaɾo~u. sakimatiniaj i, o~u ʡaɾo~u ʡajaw no~u maɾanano~um, maso~uno~uɾ i səra ato~u maɾaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮ. o~u mimiŋaj ʡaɾo~u o~u ʦiʦiʡ, ʡaɾo~u ato~u saʡo~uwaʦ . tarawaɬ~ɮaw i o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan, kasao~upo~uan no~u maso~uno~uɾaj nano~um; paɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u ɾaʡəno~uaj no~u səra ato~u nəmnəm a nano~um; miso~upəɬ~ɮaj o~u ɾiʔətəʦaj ato~u so~uʔəɬ~ɮa paro~uʦək to~u paɾapaɾa.
S.FORM: Sa'alo'alo Kasa'alo'alo o karomakatan no nanom, kafesa'ay han ko sowal, masonol tayra i riyar, fanaw ato roma 'alo. Sakimatiniay i, o 'alo 'ayaw no malananom, masonol i sera ato malalahod. O mimingay 'alo o cici', 'alo ato sa'owac . Tarawadaw i o kadado'edoan, kasaopoan no masonolay nanom; palolol to la'enoay no sera ato nemnem a nanom; misopeday o li^etecay ato so^eda parocek to palapala.
S.PHON: saʡaɾo~uʡaɾo~u kasaʡaɾo~uʡaɾo~u o~u karo~umakatan no~u nano~um, kafəsaʡaj ħan ko~u so~uwaɾ, maso~uno~uɾ tajra i rijar, fanaw ato~u ro~uma ʡaɾo~u. sakimatiniaj i, o~u ʡaɾo~u ʡajaw no~u maɾanano~um, maso~uno~uɾ i səra ato~u maɾaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮ. o~u mimiŋaj ʡaɾo~u o~u ʦiʦiʡ, ʡaɾo~u ato~u saʡo~uwaʦ . tarawaɬ~ɮaw i o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan, kasao~upo~uan no~u maso~uno~uɾaj nano~um; paɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u ɾaʡəno~uaj no~u səra ato~u nəmnəm a nano~um; miso~upəɬ~ɮaj o~u ɾiʔətəʦaj ato~u so~uʔəɬ~ɮa paro~uʦək to~u paɾapaɾa.
